_about: Map written words to speak-as spellings for Edge TTS en-US. Keys starting with _ are ignored. Whole-word, case-insensitive. Add entries ONLY when synthesis repeatedly garbles standard spelling — most Ghana placenames stay as spelled (one word). If TTS spells letters (e.g. S-W-A), avoid hyphens before s+consonant+vowel; use a space between chunks instead (e.g. Kaah swah).
